cover_illustration.alt: The solar system showing the sun and planets in orbit
cover_illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='200' height='200' fill='#050514'/><circle cx='10' cy='15' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='45' cy='8' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='80' cy='20' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.9'/><circle cx='150' cy='10' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='190' cy='25' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='25' cy='60' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='50' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='25' fill='#FFD600'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='25' fill='url(#sunGrad)'/><defs><radialGradient id='sunGrad'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#FFFDE7'/><stop offset='60%' stop-color='#FFD600'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#FF8F00'/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx='100' cy='100' rx='50' ry='8' fill='none' stroke='#546E7A' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.4'/><ellipse cx='100' cy='100' rx='68' ry='11' fill='none' stroke='#546E7A' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.4'/><ellipse cx='100' cy='100' rx='85' ry='14' fill='none' stroke='#546E7A' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.4'/><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='5' fill='#42A5F5'/><circle cx='168' cy='100' r='6' fill='#FF7043'/><circle cx='185' cy='100' r='7' fill='#FFA726'/><circle cx='44' cy='108' r='3' fill='#795548'/></svg>

illustration.alt: The sun showing solar flares and sunspots
illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='300' height='200' fill='#050514'/><circle cx='5' cy='10' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='40' cy='5' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='280' cy='15' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='260' cy='40' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='150' cy='105' r='80' fill='#FF8F00'/><circle cx='150' cy='105' r='80' fill='url(#sunFull)'/><defs><radialGradient id='sunFull'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#FFFDE7'/><stop offset='50%' stop-color='#FFD600'/><stop offset='85%' stop-color='#FF8F00'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#E65100'/></radialGradient></defs><circle cx='130' cy='90' r='10' fill='#E65100' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='165' cy='115' r='7' fill='#BF360C' opacity='0.6'/><path d='M150,25 Q190,10 200,35 Q175,30 150,25' fill='#FF5722'/><path d='M215,60 Q240,30 245,65 Q230,55 215,60' fill='#FF7043'/><path d='M230,110 Q260,90 255,125 Q245,110 230,110' fill='#FF5722'/></svg>

illustration.alt: Earth and Mars shown to scale in space with their moons
illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='300' height='200' fill='#050514'/><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='280' cy='10' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='250' cy='180' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='50' fill='#1565C0'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='50' fill='url(#earthGrad)'/><defs><radialGradient id='earthGrad'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#1E88E5'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#0D47A1'/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx='90' cy='80' rx='18' ry='12' fill='#2E7D32' transform='rotate(-20 90 80)'/><ellipse cx='115' cy='105' rx='15' ry='10' fill='#2E7D32' transform='rotate(15 115 105)'/><ellipse cx='80' cy='115' rx='12' ry='8' fill='#33691E'/><ellipse cx='100' cy='58' rx='22' ry='8' fill='#ECEFF1' opacity='0.7'/><ellipse cx='118' cy='135' rx='20' ry='7' fill='#ECEFF1' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='165' cy='75' r='10' fill='#BDBDBD'/><circle cx='162' cy='72' r='3' fill='#9E9E9E'/><ellipse cx='165' cy='75' rx='14' ry='3' fill='none' stroke='#9E9E9E' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='230' cy='120' r='30' fill='#BF360C'/><circle cx='225' cy='115' r='7' fill='#D84315' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='240' cy='130' r='5' fill='#8D6E63' opacity='0.6'/><ellipse cx='215' cy='108' rx='12' ry='6' fill='#FFCCBC' opacity='0.4'/><circle cx='275' cy='100' r='6' fill='#78909C'/></svg>

illustration.alt: Saturn with its distinctive ring system in space
illustration.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='300' height='200' fill='#050514'/><circle cx='15' cy='25' r='1.5' fill='white' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='280' cy='30' r='1' fill='white' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='55' fill='#F9A825'/><circle cx='150' cy='100' r='55' fill='url(#saturnGrad)'/><defs><radialGradient id='saturnGrad'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#FFF8E1'/><stop offset='50%' stop-color='#FFE082'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#F9A825'/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx='155' cy='88' rx='40' ry='12' fill='#FFD54F' opacity='0.4'/><ellipse cx='148' cy='112' rx='38' ry='10' fill='#FF8F00' opacity='0.3'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='100' rx='100' ry='18' fill='none' stroke='#FFCC02' stroke-width='8' opacity='0.4'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='100' rx='100' ry='18' fill='none' stroke='#FF8F00' stroke-width='5' opacity='0.25'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='100' rx='85' ry='14' fill='none' stroke='#FFE082' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.35'/><ellipse cx='150' cy='100' rx='115' ry='22' fill='none' stroke='#FFA000' stroke-width='3' opacity='0.2'/></svg>

plasma.definition: A hot, glowing gas made of charged particles; the fourth state of matter

orbit.definition: The curved path of an object moving around a star or planet

magnitude.definition: The brightness of a star as seen from Earth

nebula.definition: A vast cloud of gas and dust in space where new stars form
